card_eligibility.source_phrase: Massachusetts residents may obtain a library card in person by presenting identification and proof of current address.
card_eligibility.source_block:
Massachusetts residents may obtain a library card in person by presenting identification and proof of current address. There is no waiting period for a library card. You must be at least five years old to get a card.

You may sign up for a temporary card online , which allows you to download eBooks and access state provided databases. Please read the Minuteman page on temporary cards for more information.
